title: Define Eval Layer V1 spec for Charlie quality scoring and learning loop
summary: Added a build-ready implementation spec for evaluation contracts, scoring, fault attribution, performance profiling, and a Mission Control learning page; updated active task board slices for execution.
changes: Documented eval data model tables and schema fields.
Documented new eval and learning API routes.
Defined Charlie integration flow for score + attribution + delegation weighting.
Defined Mission Control UI surfaces for evaluation and learning.
Added EXP-010a to EXP-010d as active execution slices.
risks: Rubric quality determines scoring quality; weak rubric design can bias delegation.
If attribution logic is weak, system may misclassify input gaps as agent failures.
rollback: Remove EXP-010 entries from TASK_BOARD and archive spec as draft-only.
